Print Sheet: Elite - Security Company - LB Airport Security

rows:
Your original name was Ulrich Morris, a retainer of Lady Anne Bowesley from her mortal years. You were always on her side solving her problems dealing with the mortal world, when she was elevated to Prince of London she rose you to the ranks of the undead. Having served as a ghoul for hundreds of years even though decades have past you have yet to break the habit of opening doors for people or getting up when people ask for something. 
Calling the politics of London extreme would be an understatement, as even Anne, did not start her powerbase there you asked for advice on where to go to make your spurs. After a week she said, Prepare to go to Los Angeles so prepare you did. Why she wanted you to go to an Anarch city, was beyond you. Until one night in court, an Archon came and said that Los Angeles was taken by the Camarilla. How did she know eluded you but you will not question the wisdom that has gotten you this far. 
When you were leaving she gave you two things, One advice “Always let a Tremere feel they have the upper hand regardless of what you actually give them” and secondly, and second a request, “There is a book of our legacy lost (something that says all the Ventrue and their generations) a seer has said it will arrive in los angeles. If you can return it to the clan, I will have a personal reward for you my old friend. 
You got on the plane, and landed in Los Angeles when you tried to feed you learned that none of your old herd fills you anymore. Only vampire blood seems to, You called the Queen in a panic, and she told you that it is common in your line, especially if you lived on vampire blood for so long, and she said you must take the Princehood, or at least get a prince to give you permission to hunt other vampires. 
Embrace: 1966 (Oxford, England)     Sire: Lady Anne Bowesley
Luke Jackson  (Toreador) A jack of all trades that would make a great ally in the nights coming. You have heard of him but never met.
Alexandar Baird (Brujah) A famous sheriff of many courts, the problem is what he is famous for is his princes dying.
Lady Anne Bowesley (Sire) As how well you do reflects on her, she will be happy to help when she can.
